objects.name: Order
objects.description: A client purchase order received via the EDI 940 Warehouse Shipping Order, validated and accepted in TMS, then decomposed into one or more Consignments.
objects.descriptionZh: 通过 EDI 940 仓储发货单接收的客户订单，在 TMS 中校验并接受后，分解为一个或多个货件。

sources.snippet: `orderId` | string (ORD-#########) | **Primary key**
Consumes the inbound `Order` (received from the client via EDI 940 Warehouse Shipping Order, normalized by the EDI Gateway). Produces a validated `Order` with status `Accepted`

objects.name: Consignment
objects.description: The goods destined for a single ship-to party, managed in WMS; the customs sub-process and international handling are driven off this object.
objects.descriptionZh: 发往单一收货方的货物，由 WMS 管理；报关子流程与国际处理均以此对象为基础。
objects.relationship_description: Order decomposed into Consignment. Shipment groups Consignment. Consignment has customs declaration CustomsDeclaration. Consignment.order_id references Order. Consignment.shipment_id references Shipment.

properties.name: shipment_id
properties.description: FK to Shipment.shipmentId; nullable until planned.

properties.name: declared_value_usd
properties.description: Used by Rule R8 and R19.

sources.snippet: `consignmentId` | string (CON-#########) | **Primary key**
one or more `Consignment` records, each representing the goods destined for a single ship-to party

objects.name: Shipment
objects.description: A freight movement in TMS that groups one or more Consignments along a Lane, is tendered to a Carrier, and is tracked from In Transit to Delivered against a committed delivery window.
objects.descriptionZh: TMS 中的货运运输，沿某条运线归集一个或多个货件，向承运商招标，并在承诺送达窗口内从在途跟踪至已送达。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment groups Consignment. Shipment runs on Lane. Shipment tendered to Carrier. Shipment governed by SLA. Shipment has stop Stop. Shipment has tracking event TrackingEvent. Shipment has pod ProofOfDelivery. Shipment.lane_id references Lane. Shipment.carrier_id references Carrier. Shipment.sla_id references SLA.

properties.name: carrier_id
properties.description: FK to Carrier.carrierId; set at tender.

sources.snippet: `shipmentId` | string (SHP-#########) | **Primary key**
groups them into a `Shipment` along an eligible `Lane`

objects.name: Stop
objects.description: An ordered pickup or delivery location on a Shipment's route, with an appointment window against which dwell and detention are measured.
objects.descriptionZh: 运单路线上有序的提货或送货地点，带有约定时间窗口，用于衡量停留与滞留时间。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment has stop Stop. Stop.shipment_id references Shipment.

sources.snippet: `stopId` | string | **Primary key**
ordered `Stop` records (pickup → delivery)

objects.name: Carrier
objects.description: A motor carrier identified by its SCAC code, qualified per Lane, governed by on-time performance and cargo-insurance thresholds, and the counterparty to tenders and service-failure claims.
objects.descriptionZh: 以 SCAC 代码标识的汽车承运商，按运线资格审核，受准时率与货物保险阈值约束，是招标与服务失败索赔的对手方。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment tendered to Carrier. Lane approves Carrier. ServiceFailureClaim filed against Carrier.

properties.name: carrier_id
properties.description: SCAC (Standard Carrier Alpha Code) primary key.

sources.snippet: `carrierId` | string (SCAC) | **Primary key** (Standard Carrier Alpha Code)
selects a `Carrier` qualified for the `Lane`

objects.name: Lane
objects.description: An origin–destination corridor in TMS with a commitment tier (Guaranteed or Standard) and an approved-carrier roster that governs which Carriers may be tendered freight.
objects.descriptionZh: TMS 中的起讫点走廊，带有承诺等级（保证或标准）与经批准的承运商名单，决定哪些承运商可被招标。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment runs on Lane. Lane approves Carrier. Lane has sla SLA.

sources.snippet: `laneId` | string (LN-####) | **Primary key**
A `Shipment` must be tendered to a `Carrier` that is qualified for the Shipment's `Lane`

objects.name: SLA
objects.description: The service-level commitment attached to a Lane that defines the committed transit hours and the credit schedule against which a Shipment's delivery window is evaluated.
objects.descriptionZh: 附加于运线的服务级别承诺，定义承诺运输时长与信用减免方案，用以评估运单送达窗口。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment governed by SLA. Lane has sla SLA. SLA.lane_id references Lane.

sources.snippet: `slaId` | string | **Primary key**
The system resolves the applicable `SLA` from the Lane (guaranteed vs. standard) and computes the committed delivery window.

objects.name: CustomsDeclaration
objects.description: The customs filing for an international Consignment submitted to the broker via CBP-Link, carrying entry type, duties, and any export-license reference; it must be Accepted before departure.
objects.descriptionZh: 通过 CBP-Link 向报关行提交的国际货件报关申报，载有进口类型、关税及任何出口许可引用；须在发运前被接受。
objects.relationship_description: Consignment has customs declaration CustomsDeclaration. CustomsDeclaration.consignment_id references Consignment.

sources.snippet: `declarationId` | string (CD-#########) | **Primary key**
produces a `CustomsDeclaration` filed to the broker via CBP-Link

objects.name: TrackingEvent
objects.description: A canonicalized shipment status record appended to a Shipment from inbound EDI 214 messages, mapping raw EDI status codes to lifecycle states and driving SLA re-evaluation.
objects.descriptionZh: 从入站 EDI 214 报文追加到运单上的规范化状态记录，将原始 EDI 状态码映射为生命周期状态并触发 SLA 重新评估。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment has tracking event TrackingEvent. TrackingEvent.shipment_id references Shipment.

properties.name: edi_status_code
properties.description: Raw EDI 214 code, e.g., AF, X3, AG, D1.

sources.snippet: `eventId` | string | **Primary key**
appends `TrackingEvent` records to the Shipment, mapping cryptic status codes (e.g., `X3`, `AG`, `D1`) to canonical lifecycle states

objects.name: ProofOfDelivery
objects.description: The captured evidence of delivery in WMS — timestamp plus recipient signature, or a geotagged photo in lieu of signature — without which a Shipment may not be marked Delivered.
objects.descriptionZh: WMS 中采集的送达证据——时间戳加收件人签名，或在无签名时以带地理标记的照片代替——缺此运单不得标记为已送达。
objects.relationship_description: Shipment has pod ProofOfDelivery. ProofOfDelivery.shipment_id references Shipment.

sources.snippet: `podId` | string (POD-#########) | **Primary key**
A `Shipment` may not be marked `Delivered` without a captured `ProofOfDelivery`.

objects.name: Exception
objects.description: A TMS record opened automatically on an SLA breach or customs hold, classified by type and liability, that drives whether a service-failure claim is raised and is not closed until any linked claim is terminal.
objects.descriptionZh: 在 SLA 违约或海关扣留时由 TMS 自动开立的记录，按类型与责任归属分类，决定是否提起服务失败索赔，且在任何关联索赔进入终态前不得关闭。
objects.relationship_description: Exception raises ServiceFailureClaim. Exception.shipment_id references Shipment. Exception.consignment_id references Consignment.

sources.snippet: `exceptionId` | string (EXC-#########) | **Primary key**
produces an `Exception` record classified by type (`SLA_BREACH`, `CUSTOMS_HOLD`, `DAMAGE`, `LOST`) with a severity and an assigned owner.

objects.name: ServiceFailureClaim
objects.description: A credit claim raised against a Carrier for a service failure on a guaranteed Lane, carrying the calculated credit amount and cited CSA clause; it must be submitted within 30 days and reach a terminal state before its Exception closes.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对保证运线服务失败向承运商提起的减免索赔，载有计算的减免金额与引用的 CSA 条款；须在 30 天内提交，并在其异常关闭前进入终态。
objects.relationship_description: Exception raises ServiceFailureClaim. ServiceFailureClaim filed against Carrier. ServiceFailureClaim.exception_id references Exception. ServiceFailureClaim.carrier_id references Carrier.

sources.snippet: `claimId` | string (CLM-#########) | **Primary key**
produces a `ServiceFailureClaim` with the calculated credit amount and the cited CSA clause attached.

relationships.name: decomposed_into
relationships.description: An accepted Order is decomposed into one or more Consignments.

sources.snippet: Produces a validated `Order` with status `Accepted` and one or more `Consignment` records
An `Order` must be assigned to at least one `Consignment` before a `Shipment` may be planned.

relationships.name: groups
relationships.description: A Shipment groups one or more Consignments along a Lane.

sources.snippet: Consumes one or more accepted `Consignment` records and groups them into a `Shipment`

relationships.name: runs_on
relationships.description: A Shipment runs along an eligible Lane.

sources.snippet: `laneId` | string | **FK** → `Lane.laneId`

relationships.name: tendered_to
relationships.description: A planned Shipment is tendered to a Carrier qualified for the Lane.

sources.snippet: selects a `Carrier` qualified for the `Lane`
A `Shipment` must be tendered to a `Carrier` that is qualified for the Shipment's `Lane`

relationships.name: governed_by
relationships.description: A Shipment's committed delivery window derives from its SLA.

sources.snippet: `slaId` | string | **FK** → `SLA.slaId`

relationships.name: has_stop
relationships.description: A Shipment has ordered pickup and delivery Stops.

sources.snippet: ordered `Stop` records (pickup → delivery)

relationships.name: has_tracking_event
relationships.description: A Shipment accumulates TrackingEvents from inbound EDI 214 messages.

sources.snippet: appends `TrackingEvent` records to the Shipment

relationships.name: has_pod
relationships.description: A delivered Shipment has a captured ProofOfDelivery.

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` may not be marked `Delivered` without a captured `ProofOfDelivery`.

relationships.name: approves
relationships.description: A Lane maintains an approved-carrier roster of Carriers eligible for tender.

sources.snippet: `approvedCarrierIds` | array<string> | FK → `Carrier.carrierId` (Rule R2)
a Carrier not listed on the Lane's approved-carrier roster may not be tendered freight on that Lane

relationships.name: has_sla
relationships.description: A Lane defines one or more SLAs (guaranteed vs. standard).

sources.snippet: `laneId` | string | **FK** → `Lane.laneId`

relationships.name: has_customs_declaration
relationships.description: An international Consignment has a CustomsDeclaration filed with the broker.

sources.snippet: produces a `CustomsDeclaration` filed to the broker via CBP-Link

relationships.name: raises

label.zh: 异常提起服务失败索赔

relationships.description: A credit-eligible carrier-liable Exception on a guaranteed Lane raises a ServiceFailureClaim.

sources.snippet: An `Exception` classified as `liability = CARRIER` on a guaranteed `Lane` is required to generate a `ServiceFailureClaim`

relationships.name: filed_against

label.zh: 服务失败索赔针对承运商

relationships.description: A ServiceFailureClaim is filed against the Carrier responsible for the service failure.

sources.snippet: Submits the claim to the Carrier.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Order must have a Consignment before planning
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Order must be assigned to at least one Consignment before a Shipment may be planned.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Constraints that must hold before a Shipment can be planned from accepted Orders and Consignments.
rules.title: Order must have a Consignment before planning
rules.titleZh: 订单计划前须分配货件

statement.en: An Order must be assigned to at least one Consignment before a Shipment may be planned.
statement.zh: 在可计划运单之前，订单必须被分配至少一个货件。

sources.snippet: An `Order` must be assigned to at least one `Consignment` before a `Shipment` may be planned.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Tender only to Lane-qualified Carrier
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Shipment must be tendered to a Carrier that is qualified for the Shipment's Lane; a Carrier not listed on the Lane's approved-carrier roster may not be tendered freight on that Lane.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing which Carriers may be tendered freight by Lane qualification, performance, and high-value insurance.
rules.title: Tender only to Lane-qualified Carrier
rules.titleZh: 仅向运线合格承运商招标

statement.en: A Shipment must be tendered to a Carrier that is qualified for the Shipment's Lane; a Carrier not listed on the Lane's approved-carrier roster may not be tendered freight on that Lane.
statement.zh: 运单必须招标给具备该运单运线资格的承运商；未列入该运线批准承运商名单的承运商不得在该运线被招标货物。

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` must be tendered to a `Carrier` that is qualified for the Shipment's `Lane`; a Carrier not listed on the Lane's approved-carrier roster may not be tendered freight on that Lane.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Missed guaranteed Lane qualifies for credit
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Shipment on a guaranteed Lane that misses its committed delivery window is required to qualify for a service-failure credit from the Carrier.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: How a guaranteed-Lane SLA miss qualifies for, sizes, and time-bounds a service-failure credit.
rules.title: Missed guaranteed Lane qualifies for credit
rules.titleZh: 保证运线超时享有减免

statement.en: A Shipment on a guaranteed Lane that misses its committed delivery window is required to qualify for a service-failure credit from the Carrier.
statement.zh: 保证运线上的运单若错过其承诺送达窗口，须有资格向承运商索取服务失败减免。

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` on a guaranteed `Lane` that misses its committed delivery window is required to qualify for a service-failure credit from the `Carrier`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Service-failure credit schedule
rules.standardizedLogicRule: The service-failure credit on a guaranteed Lane shall equal 25% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by up to 24 hours, and 100% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by more than 24 hours.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: How a guaranteed-Lane SLA miss qualifies for, sizes, and time-bounds a service-failure credit.
rules.title: Service-failure credit schedule
rules.titleZh: 服务失败减免方案

statement.en: The service-failure credit on a guaranteed Lane shall equal 25% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by up to 24 hours, and 100% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by more than 24 hours.
statement.zh: 保证运线的服务失败减免：延误不超过 24 小时时为干线运费的 25%，延误超过 24 小时时为干线运费的 100%。

sources.snippet: The service-failure credit on a guaranteed `Lane` shall equal 25% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by up to 24 hours, and 100% of the linehaul charge when delivery is late by more than 24 hours.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Claim must be submitted within 30 days
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ServiceFailureClaim must be submitted to the Carrier within 30 calendar days of the ShipmentDelivered event, or the claim is waived.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: How a guaranteed-Lane SLA miss qualifies for, sizes, and time-bounds a service-failure credit.
rules.title: Claim must be submitted within 30 days
rules.titleZh: 索赔须在 30 天内提交

statement.en: A ServiceFailureClaim must be submitted to the Carrier within 30 calendar days of the ShipmentDelivered event, or the claim is waived.
statement.zh: 服务失败索赔必须在运单已送达事件后 30 个日历日内提交给承运商，否则索赔失效。

sources.snippet: A `ServiceFailureClaim` must be submitted to the `Carrier` within 30 calendar days of the `ShipmentDelivered` event, or the claim is waived.

rules.specificScenarioStage: On departure of an international Consignment
rules.businessLogicRuleName: International Consignment needs Accepted customs to depart
rules.submissionCriteria: On departure of an international Consignment
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An international Consignment may not depart the origin facility until its CustomsDeclaration status is Accepted and duties are assigned.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Trade-compliance gates for international Consignments — entry type, filing lead time, export licensing, and departure clearance.
rules.title: International Consignment needs Accepted customs to depart
rules.titleZh: 国际货件须报关接受后方可发运

statement.en: An international Consignment may not depart the origin facility until its CustomsDeclaration status is Accepted and duties are assigned.
statement.zh: 国际货件在其报关单状态为已接受且关税已核定之前，不得离开起运设施。

rules.formal: Consignment.isInternational ∧ Consignment.depart ⇒ CustomsDeclaration.status = Accepted ∧ duties assigned

trigger.description: On departure of an international Consignment

sources.snippet: An international `Consignment` may not depart the origin facility until its `CustomsDeclaration` status is `Accepted` and duties are assigned.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Customs filing lead time by mode
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A CustomsDeclaration is required to be filed at least 24 hours before the scheduled departure for any ocean Consignment and at least 4 hours before for any air Consignment.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Trade-compliance gates for international Consignments — entry type, filing lead time, export licensing, and departure clearance.
rules.title: Customs filing lead time by mode
rules.titleZh: 按运输方式的报关提前时限

statement.en: A CustomsDeclaration is required to be filed at least 24 hours before the scheduled departure for any ocean Consignment and at least 4 hours before for any air Consignment.
statement.zh: 报关单须在任何海运货件预定发运前至少 24 小时、任何空运货件预定发运前至少 4 小时提交。

sources.snippet: A `CustomsDeclaration` is required to be filed at least 24 hours before the scheduled departure for any ocean `Consignment` and at least 4 hours before for any air `Consignment`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Formal entry at or above USD 2,500
rules.standardizedLogicRule: Any Consignment with a declared customs value at or above USD 2,500 must include a formal entry with a licensed customs broker; below USD 2,500 an informal entry may be used.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Trade-compliance gates for international Consignments — entry type, filing lead time, export licensing, and departure clearance.
rules.title: Formal entry at or above USD 2,500
rules.titleZh: USD 2,500 及以上须正式报关

statement.en: Any Consignment with a declared customs value at or above USD 2,500 must include a formal entry with a licensed customs broker; below USD 2,500 an informal entry may be used.
statement.zh: 申报海关价值达到或超过 2,500 美元的货件必须通过持牌报关行办理正式报关；低于 2,500 美元可采用非正式报关。

sources.snippet: Any `Consignment` with a declared customs value at or above USD 2,500 must include a formal entry with a licensed customs broker; below USD 2,500 an informal entry may be used.

rules.specificScenarioStage: On departure release for controlled goods
rules.businessLogicRuleName: Controlled goods need export-license reference
rules.submissionCriteria: On departure release for controlled goods
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Consignment whose contents include controlled or dual-use commodities shall not be released for departure without a recorded export-license reference on its CustomsDeclaration.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Trade-compliance gates for international Consignments — entry type, filing lead time, export licensing, and departure clearance.
rules.title: Controlled goods need export-license reference
rules.titleZh: 管制货物须有出口许可引用

statement.en: A Consignment whose contents include controlled or dual-use commodities shall not be released for departure without a recorded export-license reference on its CustomsDeclaration.
statement.zh: 含有管制或两用商品的货件，在其报关单上未记录出口许可引用之前不得放行发运。

trigger.description: On departure release for controlled goods

sources.snippet: A `Consignment` whose contents include controlled or dual-use commodities shall not be released for departure without a recorded export-license reference on its `CustomsDeclaration`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: In Transit requires pickup Stop and first TrackingEvent
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Shipment may not be marked In Transit until the pickup Stop is confirmed and the first TrackingEvent is recorded.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Mandatory status-gate controls for marking a Shipment In Transit and Delivered with valid proof of delivery.
rules.title: In Transit requires pickup Stop and first TrackingEvent
rules.titleZh: 在途须确认提货站点与首条轨迹

statement.en: A Shipment may not be marked In Transit until the pickup Stop is confirmed and the first TrackingEvent is recorded.
statement.zh: 运单在提货站点确认且首条轨迹事件记录之前，不得标记为在途。

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` may not be marked `In Transit` until the pickup `Stop` is confirmed and the first `TrackingEvent` is recorded.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Delivered requires captured POD
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Shipment may not be marked Delivered without a captured ProofOfDelivery.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Mandatory status-gate controls for marking a Shipment In Transit and Delivered with valid proof of delivery.
rules.title: Delivered requires captured POD
rules.titleZh: 已送达须采集签收凭证

statement.en: A Shipment may not be marked Delivered without a captured ProofOfDelivery.
statement.zh: 运单在采集签收凭证之前，不得标记为已送达。

sources.snippet: A `Shipment` may not be marked `Delivered` without a captured `ProofOfDelivery`.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: POD must include timestamp and signature or photo
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ProofOfDelivery must include a delivery timestamp and a recipient signature; a delivery left without signature is required to capture a geotagged photo in lieu of signature.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Mandatory status-gate controls for marking a Shipment In Transit and Delivered with valid proof of delivery.
rules.title: POD must include timestamp and signature or photo
rules.titleZh: 签收凭证须含时间戳与签名或照片

statement.en: A ProofOfDelivery must include a delivery timestamp and a recipient signature; a delivery left without signature is required to capture a geotagged photo in lieu of signature.
statement.zh: 签收凭证必须包含送达时间戳和收件人签名；无签名留货须采集带地理标记的照片以代替签名。

rules.formal: POD ⇒ deliveryTimestamp ≠ null ∧ (signatureName ≠ null ∨ photoUri ≠ null)

sources.snippet: A `ProofOfDelivery` must include a delivery timestamp and a recipient signature; a delivery left without signature is required to capture a geotagged photo in lieu of signature.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Exception opens within 15 minutes of breach
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Exception must be opened automatically within 15 minutes of an SLABreached or CustomsHeld event.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Lifecycle rules for opening, classifying, and closing Exceptions and their linked claims.
rules.title: Exception opens within 15 minutes of breach
rules.titleZh: 异常须在违约后 15 分钟内开立

statement.en: An Exception must be opened automatically within 15 minutes of an SLABreached or CustomsHeld event.
statement.zh: 异常须在 SLA 违约或海关扣留事件后 15 分钟内自动开立。

sources.snippet: An `Exception` must be opened automatically within 15 minutes of an `SLABreached` or `CustomsHeld` event.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Carrier liability on guaranteed Lane generates claim
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Exception classified as liability = CARRIER on a guaranteed Lane is required to generate a ServiceFailureClaim; an Exception classified as FORCE_MAJEURE may not generate a claim.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Lifecycle rules for opening, classifying, and closing Exceptions and their linked claims.
rules.title: Carrier liability on guaranteed Lane generates claim
rules.titleZh: 保证运线承运商责任须生成索赔

statement.en: An Exception classified as liability = CARRIER on a guaranteed Lane is required to generate a ServiceFailureClaim; an Exception classified as FORCE_MAJEURE may not generate a claim.
statement.zh: 在保证运线上责任归属为承运商的异常须生成服务失败索赔；责任归属为不可抗力的异常不得生成索赔。

rules.formal: Exception.liability = CARRIER ∧ Lane.tier = Guaranteed ⇒ ∃ ServiceFailureClaim ; Exception.liability = FORCE_MAJEURE ⇒ ¬claim

sources.snippet: An `Exception` classified as `liability = CARRIER` on a guaranteed `Lane` is required to generate a `ServiceFailureClaim`; an `Exception` classified as `FORCE_MAJEURE` may not generate a claim.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Claims over USD 10,000 need Director approval
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A ServiceFailureClaim exceeding USD 10,000 in credit value must receive Operations Director approval before submission to the Carrier.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Monetary and temporal thresholds requiring approval or governing claim eligibility windows.
rules.title: Claims over USD 10,000 need Director approval
rules.titleZh: 超过 USD 10,000 的索赔须总监审批

statement.en: A ServiceFailureClaim exceeding USD 10,000 in credit value must receive Operations Director approval before submission to the Carrier.
statement.zh: 减免金额超过 10,000 美元的服务失败索赔，须在向承运商提交前获得运营总监审批。

sources.snippet: A `ServiceFailureClaim` exceeding USD 10,000 in credit value must receive Operations Director approval before submission to the Carrier.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Carrier below 95% on-time placed on hold
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A Carrier whose rolling 30-day on-time delivery rate falls below 95% on a guaranteed Lane shall be placed on a performance-review hold and may not be tendered new guaranteed-Lane freight until reinstated.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing which Carriers may be tendered freight by Lane qualification, performance, and high-value insurance.
rules.title: Carrier below 95% on-time placed on hold
rules.titleZh: 准时率低于 95% 的承运商进入审查冻结

statement.en: A Carrier whose rolling 30-day on-time delivery rate falls below 95% on a guaranteed Lane shall be placed on a performance-review hold and may not be tendered new guaranteed-Lane freight until reinstated.
statement.zh: 在保证运线上滚动 30 日准时送达率低于 95% 的承运商，须进入绩效审查冻结，在恢复之前不得被招标新的保证运线货物。

sources.snippet: A `Carrier` whose rolling 30-day on-time delivery rate falls below 95% on a guaranteed `Lane` shall be placed on a performance-review hold and may not be tendered new guaranteed-Lane freight until reinstated.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Detention claimable only beyond 2h dwell
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A detention charge may be claimed by the Carrier only when dwell at a Stop exceeds 2 hours beyond the scheduled appointment window.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Monetary and temporal thresholds requiring approval or governing claim eligibility windows.
rules.title: Detention claimable only beyond 2h dwell
rules.titleZh: 滞留费仅超 2 小时停留方可索取

statement.en: A detention charge may be claimed by the Carrier only when dwell at a Stop exceeds 2 hours beyond the scheduled appointment window.
statement.zh: 承运商仅在某站点停留超出约定时间窗口 2 小时以上时方可索取滞留费。

sources.snippet: A detention charge may be claimed by the `Carrier` only when dwell at a `Stop` exceeds 2 hours beyond the scheduled appointment window.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Damage/loss claim within 9 months (Carmack)
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A damaged or lost Consignment claim must be filed by the customer within 9 months of the delivery date or the date delivery should have occurred, per the Carmack Amendment.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Monetary and temporal thresholds requiring approval or governing claim eligibility windows.
rules.title: Damage/loss claim within 9 months (Carmack)
rules.titleZh: 损坏/灭失索赔须在 9 个月内（卡马克修正案）

statement.en: A damaged or lost Consignment claim must be filed by the customer within 9 months of the delivery date or the date delivery should have occurred, per the Carmack Amendment.
statement.zh: 依据卡马克修正案，损坏或灭失货件的索赔须由客户在送达日期或应送达日期起 9 个月内提出。

rules.formal: DAMAGE ∨ LOST claim ⇒ filedAt − deliveryDate ≤ 9 months

sources.snippet: A damaged or lost `Consignment` claim must be filed by the customer within 9 months of the delivery date or the date delivery should have occurred, per the Carmack Amendment.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: High-value Shipment needs insured Carrier and visibility
rules.standardizedLogicRule: A high-value Shipment with declared cargo value exceeding USD 100,000 must be tendered only to a Carrier carrying cargo insurance of at least the declared value and shall require a team-driver or in-transit-visibility commitment.
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Rules governing which Carriers may be tendered freight by Lane qualification, performance, and high-value insurance.
rules.title: High-value Shipment needs insured Carrier and visibility
rules.titleZh: 高价值运单须保险承运商与可视性

statement.en: A high-value Shipment with declared cargo value exceeding USD 100,000 must be tendered only to a Carrier carrying cargo insurance of at least the declared value and shall require a team-driver or in-transit-visibility commitment.
statement.zh: 申报货值超过 100,000 美元的高价值运单只能招标给货物保险额至少等于申报货值的承运商，并须有双司机或在途可视性承诺。

sources.snippet: A high-value `Shipment` with declared cargo value exceeding USD 100,000 must be tendered only to a `Carrier` carrying cargo insurance of at least the declared value and shall require a team-driver or in-transit-visibility commitment.

rules.businessLogicRuleName: Exception closes only when claim is terminal
rules.standardizedLogicRule: An Exception may not be closed until its linked ServiceFailureClaim, if any, is in a terminal state (Settled, Credited, or WrittenOff).
rules.businessBackgroundReason: Lifecycle rules for opening, classifying, and closing Exceptions and their linked claims.
rules.title: Exception closes only when claim is terminal
rules.titleZh: 异常仅在索赔进入终态后方可关闭

statement.en: An Exception may not be closed until its linked ServiceFailureClaim, if any, is in a terminal state (Settled, Credited, or WrittenOff).
statement.zh: 异常在其关联的服务失败索赔（若有）进入终态（已结算、已减免或已核销）之前不得关闭。

sources.snippet: An `Exception` may not be closed until its linked `ServiceFailureClaim`, if any, is in a terminal state (`Settled`, `Credited`, or `WrittenOff`).

ruleGroups.rationale: Constraints that must hold before a Shipment can be planned from accepted Orders and Consignments.
Rules governing which Carriers may be tendered freight by Lane qualification, performance, and high-value insurance.
Trade-compliance gates for international Consignments — entry type, filing lead time, export licensing, and departure clearance.
Mandatory status-gate controls for marking a Shipment In Transit and Delivered with valid proof of delivery.
How a guaranteed-Lane SLA miss qualifies for, sizes, and time-bounds a service-failure credit.
Lifecycle rules for opening, classifying, and closing Exceptions and their linked claims.
Monetary and temporal thresholds requiring approval or governing claim eligibility windows.

actions.name: ValidateOrder
actions.description: Validate an inbound Order from EDI 940 and decompose it into per-ship-to Consignments.
actions.descriptionZh: 校验来自 EDI 940 的入站订单，并按收货方分解为货件。

text.en: Read the normalized inbound Order from the EDI Gateway.
text.zh: 从 EDI 网关读取规范化的入站订单。

text.en: Validate ship-to party and serviceable destination.
text.zh: 校验收货方与可服务目的地。

text.en: On success set status Accepted and create one Consignment per ship-to party.
text.zh: 成功则置状态为已接受，并按收货方各创建一个货件。

agent.toolDescription: Validate an inbound EDI 940 Order and decompose it into Consignments.
promptHints: Reject when ship-to party is missing or the destination is unserviceable.
Create one Consignment per distinct ship-to party (R1).

sources.snippet: **Action — `ValidateOrder`:** Consumes the inbound `Order` (received from the client via EDI 940 Warehouse Shipping Order, normalized by the EDI Gateway). Produces a validated `Order` with status `Accepted` and one or more `Consignment` records

actions.name: PlanShipment
actions.description: Group accepted Consignments into a Shipment along an eligible Lane and resolve the applicable SLA and delivery window.
actions.descriptionZh: 将已接受的货件沿合格运线归集为运单，并解析适用的 SLA 与送达窗口。

text.en: Group accepted Consignments onto an eligible Lane.
text.zh: 将已接受的货件归集到合格运线上。

text.en: Resolve the applicable SLA (guaranteed vs. standard) and compute the committed delivery window.
text.zh: 解析适用的 SLA（保证或标准）并计算承诺送达窗口。

text.en: Create ordered Stop records (pickup → delivery) and set Shipment status Planned.
text.zh: 创建有序站点记录（提货→送货）并将运单状态置为已计划。

sideEffects.description: Create Shipment, Stops, and attach SLA in TMS.

agent.toolDescription: Group Consignments into a Shipment, resolve SLA, and create Stops.
promptHints: Resolve SLA from the Lane's commitment tier and compute the committed delivery window.

sources.snippet: **Action — `PlanShipment`:** Consumes one or more accepted `Consignment` records and groups them into a `Shipment` along an eligible `Lane`. The system resolves the applicable `SLA` from the Lane (guaranteed vs. standard) and computes the committed delivery window.

actions.name: TenderShipment
actions.description: Select a Lane-qualified Carrier and transmit an EDI 204 load tender, booking the Carrier on EDI 990 acceptance.
actions.descriptionZh: 选择具备运线资格的承运商并发送 EDI 204 装载招标，于 EDI 990 接受时订妥承运商。

text.en: Select a Carrier qualified for the Lane from the approved-carrier roster.
text.zh: 从批准承运商名单中选择具备运线资格的承运商。

text.en: For high-value freight, verify Carrier cargo insurance and visibility commitment.
text.zh: 对高价值货物，核验承运商货物保险与可视性承诺。

text.en: Transmit EDI 204 (Motor Carrier Load Tender) via the EDI Gateway and await EDI 990.
text.zh: 经 EDI 网关发送 EDI 204（汽车承运商装载招标）并等待 EDI 990。

text.en: On acceptance, set status Tendered with the booked Carrier and PRO number.
text.zh: 接受时置状态为已招标，记录订妥承运商与 PRO 号。

sideEffects.description: Transmit EDI 204 to Carrier and receive EDI 990 via EDI Gateway.

agent.toolDescription: Tender a planned Shipment to a Lane-qualified Carrier via EDI 204/990.
promptHints: Never tender to a Carrier absent from the Lane's approved roster (R2) or on PerformanceHold (R16).
On 990 decline or timeout, re-tender to the next-ranked Carrier.

sources.snippet: **Action — `TenderShipment`:** Consumes a `Planned` `Shipment` and selects a `Carrier` qualified for the `Lane`. The EDI Gateway transmits an EDI 204 (Motor Carrier Load Tender) to the Carrier and awaits an EDI 990 (Response to a Load Tender). On Carrier acceptance, produces a `Shipment` in status `Tendered`

actions.name: FileCustomsDeclaration
actions.description: File a CustomsDeclaration for an international Consignment via CBP-Link and assign duties on broker acceptance.
actions.descriptionZh: 经 CBP-Link 为国际货件申报报关单，并在报关行接受时核定关税。

text.en: Select entry type by declared value (formal at or above USD 2,500).
text.zh: 按申报价值选择进口类型（达到或超过 2,500 美元为正式报关）。

text.en: Attach export-license reference for controlled or dual-use commodities.
text.zh: 为管制或两用商品附加出口许可引用。

text.en: File HS codes, declared value, and country of origin to the broker via CBP-Link within the mode lead time.
text.zh: 在运输方式时限内经 CBP-Link 向报关行申报 HS 编码、申报价值与原产国。

text.en: On broker acceptance, assign duties and set status Accepted; on hold, set status Held.
text.zh: 报关行接受时核定关税并置状态为已接受；扣留时置状态为扣留。

sideEffects.description: File CustomsDeclaration to broker via CBP-Link REST API.

agent.toolDescription: File a CustomsDeclaration for an international Consignment via CBP-Link.
promptHints: Only run for Consignments where isInternational is true.
Require formal entry at or above USD 2,500 (R8) and an export-license reference for controlled goods (R9).

sources.snippet: **Action — `FileCustomsDeclaration`:** For any international `Consignment`, consumes the Consignment commercial data (HS codes, declared value, country of origin) and produces a `CustomsDeclaration` filed to the broker via CBP-Link. The broker returns a disposition. Duties and taxes are assigned on acceptance.

actions.name: PickAndPack
actions.description: Pick and pack Consignment line items in WMS, produce a packing manifest, and write dims/weights back to the Shipment.
actions.descriptionZh: 在 WMS 拣选并装箱货件明细，生成装箱清单，并将尺寸/重量回写到运单。

text.en: Execute the WMS pick task against the Consignment line items.
text.zh: 对照货件明细执行 WMS 拣货任务。

text.en: Pack cartons/pallets, initialize the packing manifest, and set Consignment status Staged.
text.zh: 装箱/码垛，初始化装箱清单并将货件状态置为已备货。

text.en: Write weights and dimensions back to the Shipment in TMS.
text.zh: 将重量与尺寸回写到 TMS 中的运单。

sideEffects.description: Write dims/weights to Shipment via TMS↔WMS REST API.

agent.toolDescription: Pick, pack, and stage a Consignment in WMS.
promptHints: For international Consignments, only stage after CustomsCleared.

sources.snippet: **Action — `PickAndPack`:** Consumes the `Consignment` line items and a WMS pick task; produces packed cartons/pallets, a packing manifest, and updates the Consignment status to `Staged`. Weights and dimensions are written back to the `Shipment` in TMS.

actions.name: ConfirmDeparture
actions.description: Confirm Carrier check-in and loading at the pickup Stop, set the Shipment In Transit, and record the first TrackingEvent.
actions.descriptionZh: 确认承运商在提货站点签到与装载，将运单置为在途，并记录首条轨迹事件。

text.en: Dock Supervisor authorizes loading and confirms Carrier check-in.
text.zh: 码头主管授权装载并确认承运商签到。

text.en: Complete the pickup Stop and record the first TrackingEvent.
text.zh: 完成提货站点并记录首条轨迹事件。

text.en: Set Shipment status In Transit; EDI Gateway emits EDI 214 status AF upstream.
text.zh: 将运单状态置为在途；EDI 网关向上游发送 EDI 214 状态 AF。

sideEffects.description: EDI 214 status AF (Carrier Departed Pickup Location) sent upstream to client.

agent.toolDescription: Confirm loading/departure and set the Shipment In Transit.
promptHints: Do not mark In Transit until the pickup Stop is confirmed and the first TrackingEvent recorded (R10).

sources.snippet: **Action — `ConfirmDeparture`:** Consumes a `Staged` Consignment and a Carrier check-in; produces a `Shipment` in status `In Transit`, a completed pickup `Stop`, and the first `TrackingEvent`.

actions.name: IngestTrackingEvent
actions.description: Ingest inbound EDI 214 status messages, append canonicalized TrackingEvents, and re-evaluate the SLA against the committed window.
actions.descriptionZh: 摄取入站 EDI 214 状态报文，追加规范化轨迹事件，并依据承诺窗口重新评估 SLA。

text.en: Map the cryptic EDI status code (e.g., X3, AG, D1) to a canonical lifecycle state.
text.zh: 将晦涩的 EDI 状态码（如 X3、AG、D1）映射为规范生命周期状态。

text.en: Append a TrackingEvent record to the Shipment.
text.zh: 向运单追加轨迹事件记录。

text.en: Re-evaluate the SLA against the committed delivery window.
text.zh: 依据承诺送达窗口重新评估 SLA。

sideEffects.description: Append TrackingEvent and update Shipment status in TMS.

agent.toolDescription: Ingest an EDI 214 status, append a TrackingEvent, and re-evaluate the SLA.
promptHints: Emit SLABreached when projected or actual delivery exceeds the committed window.

sources.snippet: **Action — `IngestTrackingEvent`:** Consumes inbound EDI 214 status messages from the Carrier and appends `TrackingEvent` records to the Shipment, mapping cryptic status codes (e.g., `X3`, `AG`, `D1`) to canonical lifecycle states. On each event the system re-evaluates the `SLA` against the committed delivery window.

actions.name: CaptureProofOfDelivery
actions.description: Capture the ProofOfDelivery at the delivery Stop and set the Shipment to Delivered.
actions.descriptionZh: 在送货站点采集签收凭证并将运单置为已送达。

text.en: Capture the POD artifact (signature + timestamp, or geotagged photo in lieu of signature).
text.zh: 采集签收凭证（签名加时间戳，或以带地理标记的照片代替签名）。

text.en: Complete the delivery Stop.
text.zh: 完成送货站点。

text.en: Set Shipment status Delivered (requires a captured POD).
text.zh: 将运单状态置为已送达（须有采集的签收凭证）。

sideEffects.description: ShipmentDelivered notified to EDI Gateway, client, and finance; triggers EDI 210 reconciliation.

agent.toolDescription: Capture POD and mark the Shipment Delivered.
promptHints: Never mark Delivered without a captured POD (R11); require signature or a geotagged photo plus timestamp (R12).

sources.snippet: **Action — `CaptureProofOfDelivery`:** Consumes the delivery `Stop` and a captured `ProofOfDelivery` artifact (signature, timestamp, optional photo). Produces a `Shipment` in status `Delivered`. A Shipment may not be set to `Delivered` without a captured POD (see POL-OPS-2026 Rule 11).

actions.name: OpenException
actions.description: Open an Exception within 15 minutes of an SLA breach or customs hold, classified by type with an assigned owner.
actions.descriptionZh: 在 SLA 违约或海关扣留后 15 分钟内开立异常，按类型分类并指派负责人。

text.en: Consume the triggering event and link the affected Shipment or Consignment.
text.zh: 消费触发事件并关联受影响的运单或货件。

text.en: Create the Exception classified by type (SLA_BREACH, CUSTOMS_HOLD, DAMAGE, LOST) with severity and an assigned owner, within 15 minutes.
text.zh: 在 15 分钟内创建按类型（SLA_BREACH、CUSTOMS_HOLD、DAMAGE、LOST）分类、带严重度与指派负责人的异常。

agent.toolDescription: Open and classify an Exception from a breach or customs hold.
promptHints: Open automatically within 15 minutes of the triggering event (R13).

sources.snippet: **Action — `OpenException`:** Consumes the triggering event and the affected `Shipment` or `Consignment`; produces an `Exception` record classified by type (`SLA_BREACH`, `CUSTOMS_HOLD`, `DAMAGE`, `LOST`) with a severity and an assigned owner.

actions.name: ClassifyException
actions.description: Classify an Exception against the SLA and Lane commitment tier, setting liability and the creditEligible flag.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据 SLA 与运线承诺等级对异常分类，设定责任归属与可减免标志。

text.en: Read the Exception, attached SLA, and the Lane commitment tier.
text.zh: 读取异常、所附 SLA 与运线承诺等级。

text.en: Determine whether the breach is Carrier-attributable on a guaranteed Lane and eligible for a service-failure credit.
text.zh: 判定该违约在保证运线上是否归因于承运商并具备服务失败减免资格。

text.en: Set liability (CARRIER, CUSTOMER, INTERNAL, FORCE_MAJEURE) and the creditEligible flag.
text.zh: 设定责任归属（CARRIER、CUSTOMER、INTERNAL、FORCE_MAJEURE）与可减免标志。

agent.toolDescription: Classify an Exception's liability and credit eligibility.
promptHints: FORCE_MAJEURE may never generate a claim (R14).

sources.snippet: **Action — `ClassifyException`:** Consumes the `Exception`, the attached `SLA`, and the `Lane` commitment tier; determines whether the breach is Carrier-attributable on a guaranteed Lane and therefore eligible for a service-failure credit. Produces an `Exception` with `liability` set (`CARRIER`, `CUSTOMER`, `INTERNAL`, `FORCE_MAJEURE`) and a `creditEligible` flag.

actions.name: RaiseServiceFailureClaim
actions.description: Raise a ServiceFailureClaim for a credit-eligible Exception on a guaranteed Lane, with the calculated credit and cited CSA clause, and submit it to the Carrier.
actions.descriptionZh: 为保证运线上可减免的异常提起服务失败索赔，载明计算的减免与引用的 CSA 条款，并提交给承运商。

text.en: Read the credit-eligible Exception and the CSA credit schedule.
text.zh: 读取可减免的异常与 CSA 信用减免方案。

text.en: Calculate the credit amount (25% up to 24h late; 100% over 24h) and attach the cited CSA clause.
text.zh: 计算减免金额（延误不超过 24 小时为 25%，超过 24 小时为 100%）并附引用的 CSA 条款。

text.en: If credit exceeds USD 10,000, obtain Operations Director approval before submission.
text.zh: 若减免超过 10,000 美元，提交前取得运营总监审批。

text.en: Submit the claim to the Carrier within 30 days of ShipmentDelivered.
text.zh: 在运单已送达后 30 天内将索赔提交给承运商。

sideEffects.description: Submit claim to Carrier via EDI Gateway.

agent.toolDescription: Raise and submit a ServiceFailureClaim against the Carrier.
promptHints: Only raise for creditEligible Exceptions on guaranteed Lanes (R14).
Claims over USD 10,000 require Operations Director approval (R15) and must be submitted within 30 days (R5).

sources.snippet: **Action — `RaiseServiceFailureClaim`:** For a `creditEligible` Exception on a guaranteed Lane, consumes the `Exception` and the CSA credit schedule; produces a `ServiceFailureClaim` with the calculated credit amount and the cited CSA clause attached. Submits the claim to the Carrier.

actions.name: ResolveException
actions.description: Resolve and close the Exception on the Carrier's claim disposition, settling or writing off the linked ServiceFailureClaim.
actions.descriptionZh: 依据承运商的索赔裁定结案并关闭异常，结算或核销关联的服务失败索赔。

text.en: Consume the Carrier's claim disposition (accepted/credited or contested) and any corrective action.
text.zh: 消费承运商的索赔裁定（接受/减免或争议）及任何纠正措施。

text.en: Settle or write off the linked ServiceFailureClaim to a terminal state.
text.zh: 将关联的服务失败索赔结算或核销至终态。

text.en: Close the Exception with resolution notes (only when any linked claim is terminal).
text.zh: 以处理说明关闭异常（仅当任何关联索赔进入终态时）。

sideEffects.description: Exception.status := Resolved/Closed; Claim settled or written off.

agent.toolDescription: Resolve and close an Exception and settle its claim.
promptHints: Do not close until any linked claim is Settled, Credited, or WrittenOff (R20).

sources.snippet: **Action — `ResolveException`:** Consumes the Carrier's claim disposition (accepted/credited or contested) and any corrective action; produces a closed `Exception` with resolution notes and a settled or written-off `ServiceFailureClaim`.

events.name: order.received
events.description: An inbound EDI 940 Warehouse Shipping Order landed and was normalized into a new Order.
events.descriptionZh: 入站 EDI 940 仓储发货单到达并被规范化为新订单。

sources.snippet: **`OrderReceived`** | EDI Gateway | TMS | orderId, client, ship-to
Triggered by **`OrderReceived`** (emitted by the EDI Gateway when an inbound 940 lands).

events.name: order.accepted
events.description: An Order passed validation and was accepted, producing one or more Consignments.
events.descriptionZh: 订单通过校验并被接受，生成一个或多个货件。

sources.snippet: **`OrderAccepted`** | TMS | WMS | orderId, consignmentIds
On success, emits **`OrderAccepted`**.

events.name: order.rejected
events.description: An Order failed validation (missing ship-to or unserviceable destination) and was rejected.
events.descriptionZh: 订单未通过校验（缺少收货方或目的地不可服务）而被拒绝。

sources.snippet: If validation fails (missing ship-to, unservicedable destination), emits **`OrderRejected`** and the step terminates.

events.name: shipment.planned
events.description: A Shipment was created from accepted Consignments along an eligible Lane with a resolved SLA.
events.descriptionZh: 运单由已接受的货件沿合格运线创建，并解析出 SLA。

sources.snippet: **`ShipmentPlanned`** | TMS | EDI Gateway | shipmentId, laneId, slaId
Emits **`ShipmentPlanned`**.

events.name: shipment.tendered
events.description: A Carrier accepted the load tender (EDI 990) and the Shipment booked the Carrier with a PRO number.
events.descriptionZh: 承运商接受装载招标（EDI 990），运单订妥承运商并取得 PRO 号。

sources.snippet: **`ShipmentTendered`** | TMS | WMS, CBP-Link | shipmentId, carrierId, proNumber
On EDI 990 acceptance, emits **`ShipmentTendered`**.

events.name: tender.rejected
events.description: A Carrier declined the tender (EDI 990 decline) or the tender timed out; the Planner re-tenders to the next-ranked Carrier.
events.descriptionZh: 承运商拒绝招标（EDI 990 拒绝）或招标超时；计划员向下一顺位承运商重新招标。

sources.snippet: **`TenderRejected`** | TMS | (planner) | shipmentId, carrierId, reason
If the Carrier declines (990 decline) or the tender times out, emits **`TenderRejected`**

events.name: customs.cleared
events.description: The broker accepted the CustomsDeclaration and the system assigned duties.
events.descriptionZh: 报关行接受报关单，系统核定关税。

sources.snippet: **`CustomsCleared`** | CBP-Link | TMS, WMS | declarationId, dutiesAssignedUSD
On broker acceptance, emits **`CustomsCleared`**.

events.name: customs.held
events.description: The broker placed a hold or requested documents on a CustomsDeclaration, opening an Exception.
events.descriptionZh: 报关行对报关单实施扣留或要求补充单据，触发异常。

sources.snippet: **`CustomsHeld`** | CBP-Link | TMS | declarationId, holdReason
On a hold or document request, emits **`CustomsHeld`**, which opens the Exception to Resolution process

events.name: consignment.staged
events.description: A Consignment was picked, packed, and staged in WMS with dims and weights written back to the Shipment.
events.descriptionZh: 货件在 WMS 完成拣货、装箱与备货，尺寸与重量回写到运单。

sources.snippet: **`ConsignmentStaged`** | WMS | TMS | consignmentId, dims/weights
Emits **`ConsignmentStaged`**.

events.name: shipment.departed
events.description: A Shipment departed the pickup Stop; status moved to In Transit and the first TrackingEvent was recorded.
events.descriptionZh: 运单从提货站点发出；状态转为在途并记录首条轨迹事件。

sources.snippet: **`ShipmentDeparted`** | TMS | EDI Gateway, client | shipmentId, departure timestamp
Emits **`ShipmentDeparted`**.

events.name: tracking.event.received
events.description: An inbound EDI 214 status message was received for a Shipment.
events.descriptionZh: 为某运单接收到入站 EDI 214 状态报文。

sources.snippet: **`TrackingEventReceived`** | EDI Gateway | TMS | shipmentId, ediStatusCode
Triggered by **`TrackingEventReceived`** (per inbound 214).

events.name: sla.breached
events.description: Projected or actual delivery exceeded the committed delivery window, opening an Exception.
events.descriptionZh: 预计或实际送达超出承诺送达窗口，触发异常。

sources.snippet: **`SLABreached`** | TMS | TMS (Exception module) | shipmentId, slaId, delta
If projected or actual delivery exceeds the committed window, emits **`SLABreached`**

events.name: pod.captured
events.description: A ProofOfDelivery was captured at delivery (signature/photo + timestamp), surfaced from EDI 214 status D1.
events.descriptionZh: 送达时采集了签收凭证（签名/照片加时间戳），由 EDI 214 状态 D1 浮现。

sources.snippet: **`PODCaptured`** | WMS | TMS | podId, shipmentId, timestamp
surfaced as **`PODCaptured`**.

events.name: shipment.delivered
events.description: A Shipment was set to Delivered on captured POD, closing Order to Delivery and triggering freight-invoice reconciliation.
events.descriptionZh: 运单凭采集的签收凭证置为已送达，关闭下单到送达流程并触发运费对账。

sources.snippet: **`ShipmentDelivered`** | TMS | EDI Gateway, client, finance | shipmentId, podId
Emits **`ShipmentDelivered`**, which closes the Order to Delivery process

events.name: exception.opened
events.description: An Exception record was created and classified by type with an assigned owner.
events.descriptionZh: 异常记录被创建，按类型分类并指派负责人。

sources.snippet: **`ExceptionOpened`** | TMS | (coordinator) | exceptionId, type
Emits **`ExceptionOpened`**.

events.name: exception.classified
events.description: An Exception had its liability set and creditEligible flag determined against the SLA and Lane tier.
events.descriptionZh: 异常依据 SLA 与运线等级确定了责任归属与可减免标志。

sources.snippet: Emits **`ExceptionClassified`**.

events.name: claim.submitted
events.description: A ServiceFailureClaim with calculated credit and cited CSA clause was submitted to the Carrier.
events.descriptionZh: 载有计算减免与引用 CSA 条款的服务失败索赔已提交给承运商。

sources.snippet: **`ClaimSubmitted`** | TMS | EDI Gateway → Carrier | claimId, creditAmountUSD, citedClause
Emits **`ClaimSubmitted`**.

events.name: exception.resolved
events.description: An Exception was closed with resolution notes and a settled or written-off ServiceFailureClaim.
events.descriptionZh: 异常以处理说明结案，关联服务失败索赔已结算或核销。

sources.snippet: **`ExceptionResolved`** | TMS | finance | exceptionId, claimId, disposition
Emits **`ExceptionResolved`**.

events.name: customs.declaration.filed
events.description: A CustomsDeclaration was filed to the broker via CBP-Link, awaiting broker disposition (inferred from FileCustomsDeclaration).
events.descriptionZh: 报关单经 CBP-Link 向报关行申报，等待报关行裁定（由报关动作推断）。

events.name: claim.disposition.received
events.description: A Carrier returned a claim disposition — accepted/credited or contested — surfaced as ClaimSettled or ClaimContested (inferred trigger for ResolveException).
events.descriptionZh: 承运商返回索赔裁定——接受/减免或争议——以已结算或已争议浮现（推断的结案触发）。

processes.description: End-to-end flow from receiving a validated client Order through planning, tender, customs, warehouse outbound, transit tracking, and delivery closed on captured POD.

triggers.description: An inbound EDI 940 Warehouse Shipping Order lands.

sources.snippet: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) defines the end-to-end **Order to Delivery** (下单到送达) process
| **Order to Delivery** (下单到送达) | `OrderReceived` | `ShipmentDelivered` |

processes.description: Sub-process invoked when a Shipment contains an international Consignment: file the CustomsDeclaration, assess duties, and clear before warehouse outbound; runs to completion before pick-and-pack.

triggers.description: A tendered Shipment contains an international Consignment.

sources.snippet: ## 6. Sub-process — Customs Clearance (报关清关), invoked from Step 4.4
When a `Shipment` contains an international `Consignment`, the customs sub-process runs to completion before §4.5

processes.description: Triggered when a Shipment breaches its SLA or is held in customs: open the Exception, classify liability, raise a service-failure claim when eligible, and resolve/close on the Carrier's disposition.

triggers.description: A Shipment breaches its committed delivery window.
A CustomsDeclaration is placed on hold.

sources.snippet: It also defines the **Exception to Resolution** (异常到结案) process triggered when a Shipment breaches its committed **SLA** or is held in customs.
| **Exception to Resolution** (异常到结案) | `SLABreached` / `CustomsHeld` | `ExceptionResolved` |

stageCritiques.objects: 12 systems-of-record entities extracted with PK/FK keys and lifecycle enums from §3 of the systems doc; relationships realize the documented FKs.
stageCritiques.rules: All 20 atomic rules R1–R20 mined sentence-by-sentence and grouped into 7 clusters; exceptions E1/E2 retained as policy nuance in statements.
stageCritiques.actions: 12 actions map 1:1 to the SOP §4–§5 Action verbs with typed I/O, preconditions to the gating rules, and AgentBindings.
stageCritiques.events: 20 EventTypes — 18 extracted from SOP/systems §5, 2 inferred entry/disposition events; producedBy/consumedBy derived as the exact inverse of actions.
stageCritiques.processes: 3 processes (Order to Delivery, Customs Clearance sub-process, Exception to Resolution) chained as event-driven step graphs with branches for international vs. domestic and credit-eligible vs. not.
